name: unique_anchor_in_lowcomplex_sea
description: A unique 1 kb anchor sequence embedded at the center of a 10 Mb low-complexity (AT-rich, Shannon < 1.0) flanking sea. Models alpha-satellite islands and isolated unique sequence in centromeric/pericentromeric regions. Stresses mapper's ability to find a tiny unique signal amid massive ambiguous context.
sources: synthetic, designed as mapper stress test — no biological source
